text:
is the 14th track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack. As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

When putting together the XL, the abbreviation for "extra large", and the TT (supposedly a near-syllabication of the word "Titan"), the title can be interpreted as "extra large Titan", which in turn may reference the Colossal Titan.

Musical motifs

The track has one remix, the latter half of AOTF-s1 (4:44-7:50)

While a lot slower, the track is very similar to ətˈæk 0N tάɪtn. The choral chant, ostinato and ending appear at 0:13-2:09, 3:26-4:08 and 5:22-6:04 respectively. The main difference is that it does not feature the chorus, and has a unique section at 2:09-2:38.
